scripts.build:frontend: pnpm --filter @rsconcept/domain run build && pnpm --filter frontend run build
scripts.dev:frontend: pnpm --filter @rsconcept/domain run build && pnpm --filter frontend run dev
scripts.build:rstool: pnpm --filter @rsconcept/domain run build && pnpm --filter @rsconcept/rstool run build
scripts.build:rstool-mcp: pnpm --filter @rsconcept/domain run build && pnpm --filter @rsconcept/rstool run build && pnpm --filter @rsconcept/rstool-mcp run build
